animation-1p25hif.cssText: transform-origin: right center; transform: translateX(0%) scaleX(1); opacity: 1;
transform-origin: right center; transform: translateX(-120%) scaleX(1.8); opacity: 0;

animation-kk07vf.cssText: transform-origin: left center; transform: translateX(120%) scaleX(1.8); opacity: 0;
transform-origin: left center; transform: translateX(0%); opacity: 1;
